steps.title: Read the dash explanation
steps.content: The sentence says Kovacs's publications are frequently cited, then explains after the dash that other economists find her studies valuable. The blank must show that citations highlight usefulness.

steps.title: Choose the emphasis verb
steps.content: Choice A would mean the citations contradict usefulness. Choice B would mean they prevent it, and Choice D would mean they obscure it. Frequent citation by peers instead emphasizes the value of the research. The answer is C.
